name: codex-orchestrator
description: Default repository workflow plugin for discovery, design approval, file-backed planning, execution tracking, review gates, and document sync.

interface.shortDescription: Default repository workflow for discovery, design approval, planning, execution, and review gates
interface.longDescription: Codex Orchestrator makes discovery, requirements clarification, design specs, implementation plans, category routing, runtime state, review gates, and plan synchronization first-class workflow artifacts so repository work defaults to a durable, file-backed execution flow instead of ad-hoc chat state or a separate generic process stack.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Orchestrator as the default workflow for this repository task.
Explore context, clarify requirements one question at a time, compare approaches, and get design approval.
Turn the approved request into a spec and active plan, track step progress, route by category, and enforce review gates.
